name: vue-aria
description: Vue port of React Aria and React Spectrum

scripts.check:ci: npm run check:baseline && npm run check:parity && npm run check:test-parity && npm run check:deviations && npm run generate:status && npm run generate:docs-status && npm run validate:status && npm run compute:port-order && git diff --exit-code status.md docs/port-status.md port-order.json && npm test
scripts.status:refresh: npm run sync:status && npm run generate:status && npm run validate:status
